title: Vietnamese Quinoa Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy salad made with quinoa, muddy vegetables, and a tangy Vietnamese-inspired dressing.

ingredients.name: Muddy Vegetables (such as carrots, beets, and parsnips)

instructions: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
2. In a large bowl, combine cooked quinoa, shredded muddy vegetables, chopped cilantro, and Vietnamese chua sauce.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice and sesame oil.
4. Pour dressing over quinoa mixture and toss to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
7. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
